summary: i18n Feature Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Verified homepage translations, language auto-detection, certificate page i18n, AI chat auto-open for first-time visitors, and AI greeting in user's language.
passed_tests: Homepage displays translated content (hero title, description, features) based on selected language
Language auto-detection from browser works - when no language saved, browser language (en-US) correctly detected as English
Language switcher changes all homepage text (tested English → Spanish → German → French)
Language preference persists in localStorage (hispaloshop_language key)
AI chat (Hispalo AI) auto-opens for first-time visitors after 1.5s delay
AI chat shows personalized greeting in user's language (tested Spanish, French, English)
Certificate page loads content in user's selected language
Certificate page section headers translate correctly (Nutritional Information → Información Nutricional)
Certificate page product name translates from API (Premium Extra Virgin Olive Oil → Aceite de Oliva Virgen Extra Premium)
localStorage 'hispaloshop_chat_seen' flag set after AI chat auto-opens
Language preference persists after page reload

test_credentials.note: No credentials needed - tested as guest user

context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n system fully verified. Key findings: 1) Homepage uses t() translations from react-i18next for all text. 2) AI chat auto-opens for first-time guests via localStorage 'hispaloshop_chat_seen' flag with 1.5s delay. 3) AI greeting uses language-specific messages defined in showGuestGreeting() function in AIAssistant.js. 4) Certificate page fetches content with lang parameter and displays translated product names, section headers, and nutritional labels. 5) Language detection uses navigator.language and falls back to default (es) if not supported. 6) All 11 languages have translation files in /app/frontend/src/locales/*.json.

homepage_translations.details: Hero title, description, features section all translate correctly. Tested: English ('Discover Food You Can Trust'), Spanish ('Descubre Alimentos en los que Puedes Confiar'), German ('Entdecken Sie Lebensmittel, denen Sie vertrauen können'), French ('Découvrez des Aliments de Confiance')

browser_language_detection.details: getSavedLanguage() in i18n.js correctly detects browser language (en-US → en) when no saved preference exists

certificate_page_i18n.details: Certificate page fetches content with lang parameter. Section headers translate (NUTRITIONAL INFORMATION → INFORMACIÓN NUTRICIONAL). Product names translate from API.

ai_chat_auto_open.details: AI chat auto-opens after 1.5s for first-time visitors. Tracked via localStorage 'hispaloshop_chat_seen' flag.

ai_greeting_language.details: AI greeting displays in user's language. Spanish: '¡Hola! Soy Hispalo AI...', French: 'Bonjour ! Je suis Hispalo AI...', English: 'Hello! I'm Hispalo AI...'

language_persistence.details: Language preference saved to localStorage 'hispaloshop_language' and persists after page reload
